name: continual-harness
what_it_does: Online-adaptation framework for self-improving foundation agents — at run time the agent refines its own prompts, sub-agents, skills, and memory instead of staying frozen after deployment. Official implementation of Karten et al., 2026.

name: OpenMythos
what_it_does: Open, community implementation of a recurrent-depth Transformer — looped processing layers, switchable MLA/GQA attention, and a sparse mixture-of-experts — for researching compute-adaptive, depth-variable reasoning. Independent and not affiliated with any model vendor.
